layout_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Container border-collapse, items border-r border-b border-white/10.

components_instructions.header: Sticky nav with Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/70 border-b border-white/10.
components_instructions.hero: Asymmetric bento layout. Large 'Outfit' text for name, 'JetBrains Mono' for role. Use the generated abstract 3D topology map for the background with a 60% black overlay. Include 'ES/EN' language toggle.
components_instructions.about_me: Terminal aesthetic. Use a monospace code block style for showing his tech stack (Java, iDempiere, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Next.js, etc.).
components_instructions.services: Grid of services. Icons should be simple, high contrast (Cyan on Dark). Phosphor icons or Lucide.
components_instructions.projects: Bento Grid cards. Each card must use the specific image provided, heavily tinted dark. Hover effect: image saturates, borders glow cyan.
components_instructions.contact: Large typography social links (GitHub, Twitter, Email). No form. Massive footer 'Let's Talk' text.

hero_background.description: Abstract topology map for hero background.

hero_avatar_alternative.description: Silhouette of developer working in dim light.

project_idempiere.description: iDempiere Plugins - Extensiones de documentos y reportes.

animations.hover: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. hover:text-cyan-400 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300
animations.scroll: Use Framer Motion or React Spring for staggered entrance animations in grids.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white (#FFFFFF) or off-white (#FAFAFA) on dark zinc backgrounds for normal text. Avoid mid-grays that fail APCA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='contact-github-link', data-testid='lang-toggle-button'

general_instructions_to_main_agent: The project currently uses Next.js 12 with a pages/ directory (no app router). Either upgrade to App Router (Next 14+) or build within the pages/ directory according to standard practices.
Do NOT use Inter font. Import Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Keep styling mostly monochrome with Electric Cyan (#00E5FF) used only for accents and active states.
Implement translation logically (e.g. standard Next.js i18n or simple React context since it's a basic portfolio).
There are 5 specific projects to showcase. Use the bento grid or alternating full-width rows with the provided images.
Do NOT add a contact form. Only mailto: and social links (GitHub, Twitter).
Avoid typical Vercel/Stripe looking cards. Go for technical brutalism: 1px sharp borders, no soft drop shadows except for the glowing neon hover state.
